## File: `claude-plugin/.mcp.json`
```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "sentrux": {
      "command": "sentrux",
      "args": ["--mcp"]
    }
  }
}
```

## File: `claude-plugin/skills/scan/SKILL.md`
```markdown
---
name: scan
description: Scan a project with sentrux to get structural health grades (A-F) across 14 dimensions including coupling, cycles, cohesion, dead code, and test coverage. Use when the user wants to check code quality, architecture health, or before/after an agent session.
---

# Sentrux Scan

Use the sentrux MCP tools to analyze the current project:

1. Call `scan` with the current working directory to get an overview
2. If the user wants details, call `health` for code health breakdown or `architecture` for structural analysis
3. For agent session governance, use `session_start` before coding and `session_end` after to detect degradation

Available MCP tools: `scan` · `health` · `architecture` · `coupling` · `cycles` · `hottest` · `evolution` · `dsm` · `test_gaps` · `check_rules` · `session_start` · `session_end` · `rescan` · `blast_radius` · `level`

$ARGUMENTS
```

## File: `docs/ascii-art-logos.html`
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Sentrux ASCII Art Logos</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap');
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  body { background: #0d1117; color: #c9d1d9; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; padding: 32px; }
  h1 { font-size: 11px; color: #3fb950; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .sub { font-size: 9px; color: #484f58; margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .box { border: 1px solid #1a2a1a; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 24px; background: #0d1117; }
  .box:hover { border-color: #3fb950; }
  .label { font-size: 8px; color: #484f58; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px; }
  pre { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; line-height: 1.2; font-size: 13px; }
  .g { color: #3fb950; } .gd { color: #238636; } .gl { color: #7ee787; }
  .y { color: #d29922; } .o { color: #db6d28; } .r { color: #f85149; }
  .w { color: #c9d1d9; } .d { color: #484f58; } .dd { color: #30363d; }
  .c { color: #58a6ff; } .wb { color: #c9d1d9; font-weight: bold; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<h1>Sentrux ASCII Art Logos</h1>
<div class="sub">ghostty-style &#183; pure ascii characters &#183; terminal native</div>

<!-- 1: Treemap grid using $ and @ -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">1. Treemap Grid (Ghostty style — $@# characters)</div>
<pre>
<span class="gd">        @@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@</span>
<span class="gd">        @</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span><span class="y">########</span><span class="gd">@</span><span class="o">$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span>
<span class="gd">        @</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span><span class="y">########</span><span class="gd">@</span><span class="o">$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span>
<span class="gd">        @</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span><span class="y">########</span><span class="gd">@</span><span class="o">$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span>
<span class="gd">        @@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@</span>
<span class="gd">        @</span><span class="gl">$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span>        <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="gd">        @</span><span class="gl">$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span>        <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="gd">        @</span><span class="gl">$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span>
<span class="gd">        @</span><span class="gl">$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span>
<span class="gd">        @</span><span class="gl">$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">@</span>
<span class="gd">        @@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 2: Radar/sensor crosshair -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">2. Sensor Crosshair (radar scanning)</div>
<pre>
<span class="dd">                  |</span>
<span class="dd">                  |</span>
<span class="dd">          +-------</span><span class="g">@@@</span><span class="dd">-------+</span>
<span class="dd">          |</span>      <span class="g">@@@@@</span>      <span class="dd">|</span>          <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="dd">    ------</span><span class="g">@@@</span>   <span class="gl">@@@@@@@</span>   <span class="g">@@@</span><span class="dd">------</span>    <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="dd">          |</span>      <span class="g">@@@@@</span>      <span class="dd">|</span>
<span class="dd">          +-------</span><span class="g">@@@</span><span class="dd">-------+</span>
<span class="dd">                  |</span>
<span class="dd">                  |</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 3: S made of dots -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">3. Dotted S</div>
<pre>
<span class="g">         o@@@@@@o</span>
<span class="g">        @@</span><span class="dd">oooooo</span><span class="g">@@</span>
<span class="g">        @@</span>
<span class="g">        o@@@@@@o</span>
<span class="gl">         </span><span class="dd">oooooo</span><span class="gl">@@</span>            <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="gl">                @@</span>            <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="gl">        @@</span><span class="dd">oooooo</span><span class="gl">@@</span>
<span class="gl">         o@@@@@@o</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 4: Signal wave -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">4. Signal Wave</div>
<pre>
<span class="dd">                          </span><span class="gl">*</span>
<span class="dd">                    </span><span class="g">*</span><span class="dd">    </span><span class="gl">**</span>
<span class="dd">              </span><span class="g">*</span><span class="dd">    </span><span class="g">**</span><span class="dd">   </span><span class="gl">***</span>
<span class="dd">        </span><span class="y">*</span><span class="dd">    </span><span class="g">**</span><span class="dd">   </span><span class="g">***</span><span class="dd">  </span><span class="gl">****</span>          <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="r">*</span><span class="dd">      </span><span class="y">**</span><span class="dd">   </span><span class="g">***</span><span class="dd">  </span><span class="g">****</span><span class="dd"> </span><span class="gl">*****</span>          <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="r">**</span><span class="dd">    </span><span class="y">***</span><span class="dd">  </span><span class="g">****</span><span class="dd"> </span><span class="g">*****</span><span class="gl">******</span>
<span class="dd">===================================</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 5: Treemap with mixed characters -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">5. Dense Treemap (like actual app screenshot)</div>
<pre>
<span class="g">+============+========+=====+</span>
<span class="g">|</span><span class="gl">############</span><span class="g">|</span><span class="y">$$$$$$$$</span><span class="g">|</span><span class="o">ooooo</span><span class="g">|</span>
<span class="g">|</span><span class="gl">############</span><span class="g">|</span><span class="y">$$$$$$$$</span><span class="g">|</span><span class="o">ooooo</span><span class="g">|</span>      <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="g">+============+========+=====+</span>      <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="g">|</span><span class="gd">@@@@@@</span><span class="g">|</span><span class="g">##################</span><span class="g">|</span><span class="r">xxx</span><span class="g">|</span>
<span class="g">|</span><span class="gd">@@@@@@</span><span class="g">|</span><span class="g">##################</span><span class="g">|</span><span class="r">xxx</span><span class="g">|</span>
<span class="g">|</span><span class="gd">@@@@@@</span><span class="g">|</span><span class="g">##################</span><span class="g">|</span><span class="r">xxx</span><span class="g">|</span>
<span class="g">+======+==================+=====+</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 6: Scan beam -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">6. Scanning Beam</div>
<pre>
<span class="g">@</span><span class="dd">........................</span>
<span class="dd">.</span><span class="g">@@</span><span class="dd">.......................</span>
<span class="dd">..</span><span class="gl">@@@</span><span class="dd">......................</span>          <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="dd">...</span><span class="gl">@@@@</span><span class="dd">.....................</span>          <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="dd">....</span><span class="gl">@@@@@</span><span class="dd">....................</span>
<span class="dd">.....</span><span class="gl">@@@@@@</span><span class="dd">...................</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 7: Ghost-style S -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">7. Ghostty-Style S (dense character art)</div>
<pre>
<span class="dd">          </span><span class="gd">+===+++++++===+</span>
<span class="dd">        </span><span class="gd">+=</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">=+</span>
<span class="dd">       </span><span class="gd">+</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">+++++++</span><span class="g">$</span><span class="gd">+</span>
<span class="dd">       </span><span class="g">$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">+++</span>
<span class="dd">       </span><span class="g">$$$$$$$</span>
<span class="dd">        </span><span class="gl">+$$$$$$$$$$$$+</span>                <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="dd">          </span><span class="gl">+==$$$$$$$$$$$$+</span>            <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="dd">               </span><span class="gl">+++$$$$$$$$$</span>
<span class="dd">                    </span><span class="gl">$$$$$$</span>
<span class="dd">       </span><span class="g">$</span><span class="gd">+++++++</span><span class="gl">$$$$$$$$$$$$</span>
<span class="dd">        </span><span class="gd">+=</span><span class="gl">$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">=+</span>
<span class="dd">          </span><span class="gd">+===+++++++===+</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 8: Minimalist radar dot -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">8. Radar Dot (minimal)</div>
<pre>
<span class="dd">       .  .  .  .</span>
<span class="dd">    .              .</span>
<span class="dd">  .      </span><span class="g">+ + +</span><span class="dd">      .</span>
<span class="dd"> .     </span><span class="g">+ </span><span class="gl">@ @ @</span><span class="g"> +</span><span class="dd">     .</span>         <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="dd"> .     </span><span class="g">+ </span><span class="gl">@ @ @</span><span class="g"> +</span><span class="dd">     .</span>         <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="dd">  .      </span><span class="g">+ + +</span><span class="dd">      .</span>
<span class="dd">    .              .</span>
<span class="dd">       .  .  .  .</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 9: Circuit trace -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">9. Circuit Trace</div>
<pre>
<span class="g">  [##]----+----[##]</span>
<span class="g">    |     |     |</span>
<span class="g">    +---[</span><span class="gl">####</span><span class="g">]--+</span>              <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="g">    |     |     |</span>              <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="g">  [##]----+----[##]</span>
<span class="g">          |</span>
<span class="g">        [</span><span class="y">####</span><span class="g">]</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 10: Dependency layers -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">10. Dependency Layers (pyramid)</div>
<pre>
<span class="gl">  @@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@</span>
<span class="g">     @@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@</span>
<span class="gd">        @@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@</span>            <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="y">           @@@@@@@@@@@@@@@</span>            <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="o">              @@@@@@@@@@</span>
<span class="r">                 @@@@@</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 11: Matrix rain style -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">11. Matrix Rain</div>
<pre>
<span class="dd"> $  @  #  $  @  $  #  @  $</span>
<span class="dd"> @  $  @  #  $  @  $  #  @</span>
<span class="gd"> #  @  $  @  #  $  @  $  #</span>
<span class="g"> $  #  @  $  @  #  $  @  $</span>        <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="gl"> @  $  #  @  $  @  #  $  @</span>        <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="gl"> #  @  $  #  @  $  @  #  $</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 12: Full README hero -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">12. Full README Hero</div>
<pre>
<span class="gd">  +============+========+=====+</span>
<span class="gd">  |</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">|</span><span class="y">$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">|</span><span class="o">$$$$$</span><span class="gd">|</span>
<span class="gd">  |</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">|</span><span class="y">$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">|</span><span class="o">$$$$$</span><span class="gd">|</span>     <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="gd">  +============+========+=====+</span>     <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="gd">  |</span><span class="gl">$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">|</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">|</span><span class="r">$$$</span><span class="gd">|</span>
<span class="gd">  |</span><span class="gl">$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">|</span><span class="g">$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$$</span><span class="gd">|</span><span class="r">$$$</span><span class="gd">|</span>     <span class="g">Quality  7342</span>
<span class="gd">  +======+==================+=====+</span>     <span class="g">@@@@@@@@@@@@@@</span><span class="dd">@@@@@@</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 13: Eye/lens -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">13. Sensor Eye</div>
<pre>
<span class="dd">         ___=========___</span>
<span class="dd">      /</span><span class="gd">===</span><span class="dd">               </span><span class="gd">===</span><span class="dd">\</span>
<span class="dd">    /</span><span class="g">===</span><span class="dd">    </span><span class="gl">@@@@@@@@@</span><span class="dd">    </span><span class="g">===</span><span class="dd">\</span>       <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="dd">   |</span><span class="g">==</span><span class="dd">    </span><span class="gl">@@@@@@@@@@@@@</span><span class="dd">    </span><span class="g">==</span><span class="dd">|</span>       <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="dd">    \</span><span class="g">===</span><span class="dd">    </span><span class="gl">@@@@@@@@@</span><span class="dd">    </span><span class="g">===</span><span class="dd">/</span>
<span class="dd">      \</span><span class="gd">===</span><span class="dd">               </span><span class="gd">===</span><span class="dd">/</span>
<span class="dd">         ---=========---</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 14: Oscilloscope -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">14. Oscilloscope Trace</div>
<pre>
<span class="gd">  +----------------------------------+</span>
<span class="gd">  |</span><span class="dd">                </span><span class="gl">*</span><span class="dd">                 </span><span class="gd">|</span>
<span class="gd">  |</span><span class="dd">          </span><span class="g">*</span><span class="dd">    </span><span class="gl">* *</span><span class="dd">    </span><span class="g">*</span><span class="dd">          </span><span class="gd">|</span>     <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="gd">  |</span><span class="y">----*</span><span class="dd">   </span><span class="g">* *</span><span class="dd">       </span><span class="g">* *</span><span class="dd">  </span><span class="g">*</span><span class="dd">         </span><span class="gd">|</span>     <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="gd">  |</span><span class="dd">     </span><span class="y">***</span><span class="dd">                   </span><span class="g">***</span><span class="dd">      </span><span class="gd">|</span>
<span class="gd">  +----------------------------------+</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 15: Network graph -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">15. Dependency Network</div>
<pre>
<span class="g">          [@]</span>
<span class="g">         / | \</span>
<span class="g">       [@] [@] [@]</span>
<span class="g">       /|   |   |\</span>              <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="y">     [@][@] [@] [@][@]</span>            <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="y">       \  \ | /  /</span>
<span class="o">        [@@@@@@]</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 16: Heartbeat/EKG -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">16. Quality Pulse</div>
<pre>
<span class="dd">  ___</span><span class="g">/\</span><span class="dd">___</span><span class="gl">/\/\</span><span class="dd">___</span><span class="g">/\</span><span class="dd">____</span><span class="gl">/\/\</span><span class="dd">___</span><span class="g">/\</span><span class="dd">___</span>    <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="dd">                                          </span><span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 17: Fingerprint/scan -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">17. Code Fingerprint</div>
<pre>
<span class="dd">      </span><span class="gd">.+*@@@@@@@@*+.</span>
<span class="dd">    </span><span class="gd">.*</span><span class="g">@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@</span><span class="gd">*.</span>
<span class="dd">   </span><span class="g">+@@@</span><span class="dd">oooooooooooo</span><span class="g">@@@+</span>
<span class="dd">  </span><span class="g">*@@</span><span class="dd">oo</span><span class="gl">@@@@@@@@@@@@</span><span class="dd">oo</span><span class="g">@@*</span>         <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="dd">  </span><span class="g">@@</span><span class="dd">oo</span><span class="gl">@@</span><span class="dd">oooooooooo</span><span class="gl">@@</span><span class="dd">oo</span><span class="g">@@</span>         <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
<span class="dd">  </span><span class="g">*@@</span><span class="dd">oo</span><span class="gl">@@@@@@@@@@@@</span><span class="dd">oo</span><span class="g">@@*</span>
<span class="dd">   </span><span class="g">+@@@</span><span class="dd">oooooooooooo</span><span class="g">@@@+</span>
<span class="dd">    </span><span class="gd">.*</span><span class="g">@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@@</span><span class="gd">*.</span>
<span class="dd">      </span><span class="gd">.+*@@@@@@@@*+.</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 18: Compact badge -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">18. Compact Badges</div>
<pre>
<span class="g">[</span><span class="gl">@@@</span><span class="g">]</span> <span class="wb">sentrux</span> <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>

<span class="g">[</span><span class="gl">#</span><span class="y">#</span><span class="o">#</span><span class="g">]</span> <span class="wb">sentrux</span> <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>

<span class="gd">{</span><span class="g">$$$</span><span class="gd">}</span> <span class="wb">sentrux</span> <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>

<span class="dd">></span><span class="g">></span><span class="gl">></span> <span class="wb">sentrux</span> <span class="d">code quality sensor</span>
</pre>
</div>

</body>
</html>
```

## File: `docs/ascii-logos.html`
```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<title>Sentrux ASCII Logo Prototypes</title>
<style>
  @import url('https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap');
  * { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
  body { background: #0d1117; color: #c9d1d9; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; padding: 32px; }
  h1 { font-size: 11px; color: #3fb950; letter-spacing: 3px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 4px; }
  .sub { font-size: 9px; color: #484f58; margin-bottom: 32px; }
  .box { border: 1px solid #1a2a1a; padding: 24px; margin-bottom: 24px; background: #0d1117; }
  .box:hover { border-color: #3fb950; }
  .label { font-size: 8px; color: #484f58; letter-spacing: 2px; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 12px; }
  pre { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; line-height: 1.3; }
  .g { color: #3fb950; } .gd { color: #238636; } .gl { color: #7ee787; }
  .y { color: #d29922; } .o { color: #db6d28; } .r { color: #f85149; }
  .w { color: #c9d1d9; } .d { color: #484f58; } .dd { color: #30363d; }
  .wb { color: #c9d1d9; font-weight: bold; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<h1>Sentrux ASCII Logo Prototypes</h1>
<div class="sub">for github readme &#183; pure unicode &#183; copy-paste ready</div>

<!-- 1 -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">1. block art S + wordmark</div>
<pre>
<span class="gd">  &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;</span>
<span class="g">  &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>     <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="dd">  &#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;</span><span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>     <span class="d">quality signal for ai agents</span>
<span class="gl">  &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 2 -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">2. treemap blocks + name</div>
<pre>
<span class="g">  &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="gd">&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>
<span class="g">  &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="y">&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>  <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="gl">  &#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="gd">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>  <span class="d">5 root causes &#183; 1 signal</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 3 -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">3. minimal line + name</div>
<pre>
<span class="g">  &#x2588;</span> <span class="wb">sentrux</span> <span class="d">&#x2502; quality signal for ai agents</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 4 -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">4. quality bar hero</div>
<pre>
<span class="wb">  sentrux</span>

<span class="g">  Quality  7342</span>  <span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;</span>

<span class="d">  modularity</span>  <span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;</span>  <span class="g">6700</span>
<span class="d">  acyclicity</span>  <span class="gl">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>  <span class="gl">10000</span>
<span class="d">  depth</span>       <span class="gl">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>  <span class="gl">10000</span>
<span class="d">  equality</span>    <span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;</span>  <span class="g">6100</span>
<span class="d">  redundancy</span>  <span class="gl">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>  <span class="gl">10000</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 5 -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">5. terminal prompt style</div>
<pre>
<span class="d">$</span> <span class="wb">sentrux</span> <span class="g">scan</span> <span class="d">./my-project</span>

<span class="g">Quality  7342</span>  <span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;</span>  <span class="d">bottleneck: modularity</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 6 -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">6. large block S</div>
<pre>
<span class="g"> &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>
<span class="g"> &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;</span>
<span class="g"> &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>
<span class="gl"> &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>          <span class="wb">s e n t r u x</span>
<span class="dd"> &#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;</span><span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>
<span class="dd">             </span><span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>          <span class="d">code quality signal</span>
<span class="gl"> &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>          <span class="d">for ai agents</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 7 -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">7. radar / signal icon</div>
<pre>
<span class="dd">        &#x2502;</span>
<span class="dd">    &#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;</span><span class="g">&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;</span>
<span class="dd">    &#x2502;</span>   <span class="gl">&#x2588;</span>   <span class="dd">&#x2502;</span>    <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="dd">    &#x2502;</span>  <span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>  <span class="dd">&#x2502;</span>    <span class="d">structural quality sensor</span>
<span class="dd">    &#x2502;</span>   <span class="gl">&#x2588;</span>   <span class="dd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="dd">    &#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;</span><span class="g">&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;</span>
<span class="dd">        &#x2502;</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 8 -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">8. box drawing logo</div>
<pre>
<span class="gd">  &#x250C;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2510;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span> <span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="y">&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>    <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span> <span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="o">&#x2588;</span><span class="gd">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span> <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>  <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span> <span class="gl">&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="gd">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>  <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>  <span class="d">5 root causes &#183; 1 number &#183; better code</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2514;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2518;</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 9 -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">9. signal bars</div>
<pre>
<span class="d">  &#x2502;</span>         <span class="gl">&#x2588;</span>
<span class="d">  &#x2502;</span>      <span class="g">&#x2588;</span>  <span class="gl">&#x2588;</span>
<span class="d">  &#x2502;</span>   <span class="g">&#x2588;</span>  <span class="g">&#x2588;</span>  <span class="gl">&#x2588;</span>     <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="d">  &#x2502;</span><span class="y">&#x2588;</span>  <span class="g">&#x2588;</span>  <span class="g">&#x2588;</span>  <span class="gl">&#x2588;</span>     <span class="d">quality signal for ai agents</span>
<span class="d">  &#x2502;</span><span class="y">&#x2588;</span>  <span class="g">&#x2588;</span>  <span class="g">&#x2588;</span>  <span class="gl">&#x2588;</span>
<span class="d">  &#x2514;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 10 -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">10. half-block S (high resolution)</div>
<pre>
<span class="g"> &#x2584;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2584;</span>
<span class="g"> &#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2584;&#x2584;&#x2584;</span><span class="g">&#x2580;</span>
<span class="gl"> &#x2580;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2584;</span>      <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="dd"> &#x2584;</span><span class="g">&#x2584;&#x2584;&#x2584;</span><span class="gl">&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>     <span class="d">structural quality sensor for ai agents</span>
<span class="gl"> &#x2580;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2580;</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 11 -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">11. compact badge</div>
<pre>
<span class="gd">&#x2590;</span><span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="gd">&#x258C;</span> <span class="wb">sentrux</span> <span class="d">&#x2502;</span> <span class="g">Q:7342</span> <span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;</span>
</pre>

</pre>

<span class="g"> &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="o">&#x2588;</span><span class="y">&#x2588;</span><span class="gd">&#x2588;</span>  <span class="wb">sentrux</span>

</pre>
</div>

<span class="d"> &#x2514;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;</span><span class="y">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>     <span class="d">for ai agents</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 15 -->

<span class="g">&#x2588;</span><span class="gd">&#x2588;</span><span class="gl">&#x2588;</span> <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 16 -->
<div class="box">

<pre>
<span class="dd">     &#x2502;</span>

<span class="dd">     &#x2502;</span>           <span class="d">quality signal for ai agents</span>
</pre>
</div>

<!-- 17 -->
<div class="box">
<div class="label">17. full readme hero block</div>
<pre>
<span class="gd">  &#x250C;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2510;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>                                                    <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>  <span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="gd">&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>                                            <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>  <span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="y">&#x2588;</span><span class="gd">&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>  <span class="wb">sentrux</span>                                  <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>  <span class="gl">&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="gd">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2588;</span>  <span class="d">code quality signal for ai agents</span>          <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>                                                    <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>  <span class="g">Quality  7342</span>  <span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;</span>               <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>                                                    <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>  <span class="d">modularity &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;</span>  <span class="g">6700</span>            <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>  <span class="d">acyclicity &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>  <span class="gl">10000</span>           <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>  <span class="d">depth      &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>  <span class="gl">10000</span>           <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>  <span class="d">equality   &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;&#x2591;</span>  <span class="g">6100</span>            <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>  <span class="d">redundancy &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>  <span class="gl">10000</span>           <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2502;</span>                                                    <span class="gd">&#x2502;</span>
<span class="gd">  &#x2514;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2500;&#x2518;</span>
</pre>
</div>

<span class="g"> &#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">    &#x2592;</span>
<span class="g"> &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2592;</span>     <span class="wb">sentrux</span>
<span class="dd">      </span><span class="g">&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2592;</span>    <span class="d">the code quality sensor</span>
<span class="g"> &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span><span class="dd">&#x2592;</span>

<span class="o"> &#x2588;&#x2588;</span>
<span class="y"> &#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;&#x2588;</span>     <span class="wb">sentrux</span>

</pre>
```
